prisoner_exchange.success: BREAKING: Prisoner exchange agreed — crew coming home
prisoner_exchange.failure: Prisoner exchange talks collapse — Iran demands more concessions

covert_operation.success: Reports of explosion at Iranian military facility — cause unknown
covert_operation.failure: Iran claims to have captured US special operations personnel

emergency_budget.success: Congress approves $200M emergency appropriation for strait operations
emergency_budget.failure: Congress slashes emergency budget request — only $50M approved

media_offensive: White House launches coordinated media offensive on strait crisis
backchannel_message: Sources: back-channel communications between Washington and Tehran ongoing
allied_consultation: Allied leaders express support for US strait strategy in joint call
sanctions_adjustment: Treasury announces targeted sanctions adjustments on Iranian entities
intel_sharing: US shares classified strait intelligence with coalition partners
humanitarian_corridor: US establishes humanitarian corridor through Strait of Hormuz
economic_stimulus: President announces economic stimulus package to offset oil crisis

cyber_recon.discovery: NSA cyber reconnaissance reveals Iranian naval operation plans
cyber_recon.routine: Cyber reconnaissance gathering data on Iranian networks

war_powers_consult: President briefs Congressional Gang of Eight on military operations
regional_flyover: B-52 strategic bombers conduct visible flyover of Persian Gulf
summit_proposal: US proposes international summit on Strait of Hormuz crisis
press_embargo: White House requests voluntary media embargo on strait operations
